---
title: "Internal Interdisciplinary Research Programme (IRP) Team Funding, Large Language Models Empowering Market Orientation"
sort_year: 2026
year: "2025 – 2026"
status: "Ongoing"
funder: "Cyprus University of Technology"
categories: [Public Opinion & Argument Mining, Ongoing]
---

**Year:** 2025 – 2026
**Status:** Ongoing
**Funder:** Cyprus University of Technology
**Research Cluster:** Public Opinion & Argument Mining
